summary: Testing completed for Evolution PRO OS - Calendario Editoriale 30 Giorni and Piano Continuità features. All backend endpoints working, frontend UI displaying correctly. Fixed a bug where fallback calendario was not being persisted to database.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: Calendario persists to database after generation (fixed fallback path)
✅ Frontend: LancioPage shows 'Calendario Editoriale 30 Giorni' link with Visualizza button
✅ Frontend: CalendarioLancioPage shows strategy section with 4 weeks overview
✅ Frontend: CalendarioLancioPage shows 'Genera Calendario Lancio' button
✅ Frontend: CalendarioLancioPage displays generated calendario with week navigation
✅ Frontend: CalendarioLancioPage shows day grid with content types
✅ Frontend: CalendarioLancioPage shows export options (PDF, CSV, Google Cal)
✅ Frontend: PianoContinuitaPage shows 3 plans (Continuity €97, Growth €197, Scale €397)
✅ Frontend: Growth plan marked as 'PIÙ POPOLARE'
✅ Frontend: All plan features and CTA buttons displayed correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: Fallback calendario was not being saved to database - now persists correctly
Calendario generation uses AI with fallback to static template when LLM fails
PianoContinuitaPage correctly displays 3 pricing tiers with features
seed_data_creation: Used existing partner Marco Ferretti (id: 1) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Calendario Lancio feature is fully functional. The 30-day editorial calendar generates correctly (using fallback when AI fails) and persists to database. PianoContinuitaPage shows 3 plans correctly. Navigation: Partner view -> Lancio -> Calendario Editoriale 30 Giorni -> Visualizza button -> CalendarioLancioPage.

calendario_lancio_backend.GET_calendario: WORKING - Returns calendario array from partner_lancio collection
calendario_lancio_backend.POST_genera_calendario: WORKING - Generates 30-day calendario with AI or fallback
calendario_lancio_backend.persistence: WORKING - Calendario saved to database (fixed fallback path)

calendario_lancio_frontend.lancio_page_link: WORKING - Shows 'Calendario Editoriale 30 Giorni' with Visualizza button
calendario_lancio_frontend.calendario_page_generation: WORKING - Generate button triggers API call
calendario_lancio_frontend.calendario_page_display: WORKING - Shows week navigation and day grid
calendario_lancio_frontend.calendario_page_export: WORKING - Shows PDF, CSV, Google Cal export options

piano_continuita_frontend.popular_badge: WORKING - Growth plan marked as PIÙ POPOLARE
piano_continuita_frontend.features_list: WORKING - Each plan shows features with icons
